situation: Hate speech is being spread in the Ukrainian media

options.consequence: Reduced tension and improved international relations
Increased tension and worsening international relations

common_rookie_mistake: Ignoring hate speech and hoping it will go away
consequence_if_wrong: Increased tension and worsening international relations
rationale: Condemning hate speech publicly can help to reduce tension and improve international relations

situation: The Ukrainian media is being manipulated to spread hate speech and negative stereotypes

options.consequence: Improved critical thinking and reduced manipulation
Reduced freedom of speech and potential for further manipulation

common_rookie_mistake: Censoring the media without addressing the root cause of manipulation
consequence_if_wrong: Reduced freedom of speech and potential for further manipulation
rationale: Implementing media literacy programs can help to improve critical thinking and reduce manipulation
